title: human alpha-synuclein and aggregated alpha-synuclein immunofluorescence staining
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"drkjo","text":"This protocol is designed for  human alpha-synuclein staining using the MJFR1-Alexa 488 (RRID:AB_2537217) antibody and either anti-SynO2  (RRID:AB_2632701) or MJFR-14-6-4-2  (RRID:AB_2714215) antibodies. Tissue stained with this protocol include 35 μm free-floating mouse brain sections. All tissue was from mice perfused with 4% PFA. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9qm8c","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Rinse brain slices (35µ) in TBS (0.05M Trizma base and 0.15M NaCl; pH: 7.6) 3X 00:10:00
Quench brain slices in a solution containing 3%H 2 O 2 and 10% Methanol in TBS 00:20:00
Rinse brain slices in TBS (0.05M Trizma base and 0.15M NaCl; pH: 7.6) 3X 00:10:00
Incubate in blocking buffer (5% donkey serum, 2% BSA, 0.5% triton X-100 in TBS) 01:00:00 hour at room temperature
Incubate in mouse on mouse blocking buffer (MKB-2213; Vector Lab) 00:20:00 at room temperature
Incubate with anti-SynO2 (1:1000; RRID:AB_2632701) or anti-MJFR-14-6-4-2 (1:20000;RRID:AB_2714215) dilution in 50% blocking solution 48:00:00 hour at 4°C
Rinse brain slices in TBS (0.05M Trizma base and 0.15M NaCl; pH: 7.6) 00:00:10
Rinse brain slices in TBS-T (TBS+ 0.25% Triton X-100)) 3X 00:10:00
Incubate with rabbit anti-hASYN(1:400; RRID:AB_2537217, MJFR1-Alexa 488) 24:00:00 at 4°C in 50% blocking buffer
Rinse brain slices in TBS-T (TBS+ 0.25% Triton X-100) 3X 00:10:00
Rinse brain slices in TBS-T (TBS+ 0.25% Triton X-100) 2x 00:10:00
Mount free-floating sections on SuperFrost+ slides (if staining free-floating tissue) and let dry at room temperature for 15 minutes.
Coverslip with fluorescent mounting medium and #1.5 coverslips. Outline coverslip with clear nail polish and store at 4oC .
Incubate in fluorescent secondary antibody at 1:200 dilution in 50% blocking buffer 01:00:00 r at room temperature.
Rinse brain slices in TBS (0.05M Trizma base and 0.15M NaCl; pH: 7.6) 00:10:00
creator: Pietro La Vitola
